Can only be called by the current owner."}},"title":"MarketFactory","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"allMarkets(uint256)":{"notice":"All markets deployed by this factory (both CREATE and CREATE2)."},"create2Market(bytes32)":{"notice":"salt \u2192 proxy address for CREATE2 deployments (0 = not deployed)."},"deployWithCreate(address)":{"notice":"Deploy a new market proxy using the EVM CREATE opcode. Address is fully deterministic: keccak256(0xff ++ factory ++ salt ++ keccak256(initcode))."},"implementation()":{"notice":"The singleton V1 implementation contract all proxies point at."},"isMarket(address)":{"notice":"Whether a given address was deployed by this factory."},"predictCreate2Address(bytes32,address)":{"notice":"Compute the address a CREATE2 deployment WILL have, without deploying."}},"notice":"Deploys PredictionMarketV1 proxies using both CREATE and CREATE2. CREATE  \u2014 non-deterministic; address depends on factory nonce.           Use when you need a new market quickly and don't care about the address. CREATE2 \u2014 deterministic; address depends only on (factory, salt, initcode).           Use when you need a known address before deployment (e.g. pre-fund,           pre-approve, or commit to the address in governance). Both paths deploy a fully initialised ERC1967Proxy pointing at the same PredictionMarketV1 implementation, then wire up OutcomeShareToken and returns.market: Address of the newly deployed proxy.

params.salt: Arbitrary 32-byte value chosen by the caller.

returns.market: Address of the newly deployed proxy.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.marketOwner: Owner that will be passed to the initializer.
params.salt: The same salt that will be passed to deployWithCreate2.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

allMarkets(uint256).notice: All markets deployed by this factory (both CREATE and CREATE2).

create2Market(bytes32).notice: salt → proxy address for CREATE2 deployments (0 = not deployed).

deployWithCreate(address).notice: Deploy a new market proxy using the EVM CREATE opcode.         Address is non-deterministic (depends on factory nonce).

deployWithCreate2(bytes32,address).notice: Deploy a new market proxy using the EVM CREATE2 opcode.         Address is fully deterministic: keccak256(0xff ++ factory ++ salt ++ keccak256(initcode)).

implementation().notice: The singleton V1 implementation contract all proxies point at.

isMarket(address).notice: Whether a given address was deployed by this factory.

predictCreate2Address(bytes32,address).notice: Compute the address a CREATE2 deployment WILL have, without deploying.
